scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.build:packages: npm run clean:packages && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid
scripts.build:docs: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-docs
scripts.build:playground: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.dev:docs: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run dev --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-docs
scripts.dev:playground: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid && npm run dev --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.quality: npm run verify:ci && npm run verify:metadata && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run verify:packages && npm run verify:consumer && npm run build:docs && npm run build:playground
scripts.lint: eslint eslint.config.mjs scripts tests/package-consumer --config eslint.config.mjs && npm run lint --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run lint --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run lint --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid && npm run lint --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-docs && npm run lint --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.lint:fix: eslint eslint.config.mjs scripts tests/package-consumer --config eslint.config.mjs --fix && npm run lint:fix --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run lint:fix --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run lint:fix --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid && npm run lint:fix --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-docs && npm run lint:fix --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.verify:ci: npm run verify:toolchain && npm run test:ci-scope && npm run verify:workflows && npm run verify:templates
